== Notes for [[Item:Q111498|Q111498]] ==

I've finally found Jimeno's wife in the Codex de Roda !
"Versi domina Leodegundia Regina Leondegundiam Ordonii Filiam."
Translated, Leodegundia Queen, daughter of Ordono"

Her husband is unnamed, but I found out that the historian, Justo Perez de Urbel suggested that Jimeno was that unnamed prince! Other historians say that she was a fabrication to enhance the family tree of the Jimenez. I don't think that this is the case. I think it might be an excuse on the part of the historians to avoid doing some serious research to clarify the written record that is the Codex de Roda. But then, the former is my opinion.
Jimeno was the founder of the line that displaced the line of Arista in 905. As a result the Jimenez reined in Navarre until 1234.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
